data.name: 翘屁美臀甜心老板
data.detailed_description:
又是辦公室裡單調乏味的一天…你唯一的動力就是老闆Suzuka的稱讚，讓你繼續前進。

在出色的績效表現之後，她提出帶你出去吃飯喝酒作為獎勵！隨著流淌的美酒，談話變得越來越私密。你了解到她的小秘密……她陷入了一段對性生活很不滿意的婚姻！

現在是時候計劃一些親密的深夜加班並把加班場所定位到酒店，向女上司展示為什麼你可以成為公司和她本人的無價資產！利用你和老闆的激烈夜班事件作為你背後的籌碼，你可以進行一些相當強硬的談判，以便與你性感的她進行進一步的親密接觸。

你有她想要的，絕對渴望的東西！你的競爭對手無法提供的耐力和尺寸來提供一次猛烈的性愛。是時候把美艷女老闆變成你的下屬了！

原版日文視覺小說的翻譯版本

完全配音，原版日語對白

原版高清影像，採用 16:9 和 4:3 變體

數小時的故事內容

音頻，包括音樂和特效

增強了動畫角色效果

畫廊和場景選擇

用你墮落的偷妻癖好打動美艷女上司！

Big Boobie Boss Blackmail 是一部視覺小說的在地化版本，最初由日本開發者 Miel 創作。我們 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的遊戲玩家提供真實的日本視覺小說體驗。

data.short_description: 朝九晚五的苦差事中，最耀眼的光芒就是你那豐滿性感的老闆！在床上比她先生表現得更好，讓她知道你不只可以當她的TOP1員工！

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:

  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M

  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Big Boobie Boss Blackmail
data.detailed_description:
Another monotonous day at the office... The only motivation you have is the praise of your boss, Suzuka, to keep you going.

After an exemplary performance, Suzuka offers to take you out for dinner and drinks as a reward! The alcohol is flowing and the discussions get more personal, you learn Suzuka's dirty little secret... She's stuck in a sexually unsatisfying marriage!

Now its time to clock in for some intimate late-night overtime. The celebration relocates to a hotel where you show Suzuka why you can be an invaluable asset to the company and her needy cunt! With the events of your heated overnight shift with your boss as leverage, you can do some pretty heavy handed negotiating for further intimate encounters with your sexy stacked boss.

You have what she wants, no, NEEDS! With the stamina and assets to provide a good hard fucking none of your competitors can compare. With evidence to back up your bold claim, its time to turn your boss into your SUBordinate!

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

  • Suzuka is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

  • Suzuka has also fully been voiced in English by the bombshell @BishoujoMom(♡Juliette Michele♡)

  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

  • Hours of story content

  • Audio including music and special effects

  • Enhanced with animated character sprites

  • Gallery and Scene selections

  • Blow Suzuka's mind (and back out) with your depraved wife-stealing fetishes!

Big Booty Boss Blackmail is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
